name: cluster_42AB_chr2R
description: Drosophila piRNA-producing cluster: 42AB — dual-strand piRNA cluster on chr2R pericentric heterochromatin, ~240 kb, the largest piRNA cluster in the genome, targets dozens of TE families.. Sequence content is essentially a transposon graveyard — dense, layered TE remnants 100-99% identical to active copies elsewhere. Reads here have many off-target placements at active TE insertion sites.
